name: Kris
description:
Utilizing her deep knowledge of Pokémon on her journey, she looks out for all Pokémon and treats them with love. She is known for her kind personality.

Full name: Kristina Azure

Age: 18

Height: 173 cm

Pokemon team: Feraligatr, Arcanine, Xatu, Hitmonchan, Marowak and Parasect

Hobbies: Jogging, Bicycling and observing Pokémon in wild

Current career: Trainer and assistant of Professor Elm.

Future career: Pokemon professor

Best friends: Ethan and Lyra
creator: Ice Pokémon Trainer
